hero.subtitle: QuickTow is Pakistan's fastest emergency towing service. Get a tow truck dispatched to your location in under 30 minutes.

services.title: Complete Towing Solutions
services.subtitle: We offer a full range of roadside assistance and towing services to get you back on the road safely.

standard.name: Standard Tow
standard.desc: Regular towing for sedans, hatchbacks and small vehicles.

flatbed.name: Flatbed Carrier
flatbed.desc: Premium flatbed towing for luxury cars, AWD vehicles and sports cars.

battery.name: Battery Jump Start
battery.desc: Dead battery? We come to you with professional jump start equipment.

fuel.name: Fuel Delivery
fuel.desc: Ran out of fuel? We deliver emergency fuel to your location.

repair.name: Minor Repairs
repair.desc: On-spot minor mechanical repairs and fixes.

how.title: 3 Simple Steps to Get Help
how.subtitle: Getting a tow truck has never been easier.

step1.title: Fill the Form
step1.desc: Enter your details, vehicle info, pickup and dropoff locations.

step2.title: Get Confirmation
step2.desc: Receive your unique tracking code instantly.

step3.title: Driver Dispatched
step3.desc: Our nearest available driver is dispatched to your location.

step4.title: Problem Solved
step4.desc: Your vehicle is safely towed or repaired.

available247.title: 24/7 Availability
